column7:
1. Lookup Primary Specialty against Taxonomy Code in Crosswalk if length = 10 characters.
  - if found, direct map the input
  - If not found, go to step 2
2. Lookup Primary Specialty against Taxonomy Description in Crosswalk if length <> 10 characters.
  - if found, Map Code returned from the crosswalk
  - If not found, Reject the record
